cards.name: Page of Wands
cards.interpretation: adventure, excitement, fresh ideas, cheerfulness, energetic, fearless, extroverted

cards.name: Page of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: foolish, immature, irresponsible, lazy, underachiever, procrastinator, missed chances, poor prospects

cards.name: 10 of Cups
cards.interpretation: happiness, homecomings, fulfillment, emotional stability, security, domestic harmony
